nasb.text: For the nation and the kingdom which will not serve you will perish, And the nations will be utterly ruined.

esv.text: For the nation and kingdom that will not serve you shall perish; those nations shall be utterly laid waste.

cnv.text: 不事奉你的邦或國，都必滅亡； 那些邦國必全然荒廢。

ccb.text: 不肯向你俯首称臣的国家必灭亡，被彻底摧毁。

csbs.text: 要知道，不服事你的邦国，都必灭亡； 那些国也必全然荒废。
